mapper.select:
SELECT t.* FROM task t LEFT JOIN project p ON t.project_id = p.id WHERE
ORDER BY t.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task t LEFT JOIN project p ON t.project_id = p.id WHERE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_case WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM work_log WHERE task_id = #{taskId}

SELECT wl.id AS id, wl.task_id AS taskId, wl.user_id AS userId, wl.hours AS hours, wl.content AS content, wl.created_at AS createdAt, u.id AS user_id, u.user_name AS user_userName, u.nick_name AS user_nickName, u.avatar AS user_avatar, u.user_email AS user_userEmail FROM work_log wl LEFT JOIN users u ON wl.user_id = u.id WHERE wl.task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY wl.created_at DESC

SELECT tc.id AS id, tc.task_id AS taskId, tc.user_id AS userId, tc.content AS content, tc.created_at AS createdAt, tc.updated_at AS updatedAt, u.id AS user_id, u.user_name AS user_userName, u.nick_name AS user_nickName, u.avatar AS user_avatar, u.user_email AS user_userEmail FROM task_comment tc LEFT JOIN users u ON tc.user_id = u.id WHERE tc.task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY tc.created_at DESC

SELECT tt.id AS id, tt.task_id AS taskId, tt.event_type AS eventType, tt.title AS title, tt.content AS content, tt.from_status AS fromStatus, tt.to_status AS toStatus, tt.operator_id AS operatorId, tt.payload AS payload, tt.created_at AS createdAt, u.id AS operator_id, u.user_name AS operator_userName, u.nick_name AS operator_nickName, u.avatar AS operator_avatar, u.user_email AS operator_userEmail FROM task_timeline tt LEFT JOIN users u ON tt.operator_id = u.id WHERE tt.task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY tt.created_at DESC
